name: Old Salty's Instant Pizza
recipeIngredient: 213 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon.
2. Flake the fish into small pieces.
3. Spread 2 teaspoons of tomato relish on each half of the rolls.
4. Arrange the flaked salmon on top of the tomato relish.
5. Sprinkle grated cheese evenly over the salmon.
6. Garnish with olives, sliced gherkins, and sweetcorn kernels.
7. Place under a moderate grill until the cheese has melted and heated through.
8. Serve immediately.
Serves 4. Approx. 210 kcals per serving
